name: Herring Salad with Sour Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Sauce: Blend together sour cream, yogurt, lemon juice, and sugar until thoroughly combined.
Salad:
1. Peel the onions and cut into thin slices.
2. Peel the apples and quarter them. Remove cores and cut into thin wedges.
3. Combine the onions and apples with the sauce.
4. Arrange the herring and apple-onion mixture in layers on a dish.
5. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 5 hours.
6. Sprinkle with dill before serving.
